data.content: Shipment blocked by Claude Code shell policy denying `git push origin main`. Local main is ready at 808a1235 (2 commits ahead of origin/main: 808a1235 and d661bd7e). User action required: run `git push origin main`, confirm CI green, then run `kno next foolery-f8f4 --expected-state shipment --actor-kind agent --agent-name Claude --agent-model claude-sonnet-4-6 --agent-version claude-code`.
